sentences.english: Do you agree that people learn more from their failures than from their successes?
sentences.korean: 실패에서 성공보다 더 많이 배운다는 데 동의합니까?

sentences.english: I strongly agree that people learn more from failure than from success.
sentences.korean: 실패에서 성공보다 더 많이 배운다는 데 강하게 동의해요.

sentences.english: When we succeed we rarely stop to analyze what went right — we just enjoy the result.
sentences.korean: 성공하면 무엇이 잘됐는지 거의 분석하지 않아요 — 그냥 결과를 즐겨요.

sentences.english: But when we fail we're forced to examine our mistakes and figure out what went wrong.
sentences.korean: 하지만 실패하면 실수를 검토하고 무엇이 잘못됐는지 파악할 수밖에 없어요.

sentences.english: For example I failed my driving test the first time because I didn't check my mirrors properly.
sentences.korean: 예를 들어 첫 운전 시험에 떨어졌는데 거울을 제대로 확인하지 않아서였어요.

sentences.english: That failure made me such a careful driver that I haven't had a single accident in ten years.
sentences.korean: 그 실패가 나를 10년간 사고 한 번 없는 조심스러운 운전자로 만들었어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Do you think art and music education should be req
